theatres.title: The Odyssey
theatres.review: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.
theatres.fullReview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.
theatres.take: Reviewers were close to unanimous — this one landed.

theatres.title: Moana
theatres.review: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…
theatres.fullReview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.
theatres.take: Critics are split — praise for the originality and themes, pushback on the music.

theatres.title: Evil Dead Burn
theatres.review: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.
theatres.fullReview: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession. As her in-laws transform one by one into creatures that feed on fear, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
theatres.take: Critics are split, though the writing found admirers.

theatres.title: Kung Fu Soccer
theatres.review: The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown!
theatres.fullReview: The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown! But the Kung Fu Women's Soccer Team has been dealt a hellish script right from the start?! Their opponents are all highly skilled, and external pressure is mounting. The schemes on the field are one after another... Can they use their kung fu to turn the tide on the green field?

theatres.title: Idhayam Murali
theatres.review: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…
theatres.fullReview: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply embedded in his heart.
theatres.take: Critics are split — praise for the performances and humour, pushback on the action.

theatres.title: Beast
theatres.review: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger.
theatres.fullReview: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship against the brutal champion Xavier Grau.
theatres.take: Early read from critics: a 78% critics' score.

theatres.title: Kokuho
theatres.review: Nagasaki, 1964: Following the death of his Yakuza father, 15-year-old Kikuo is taken under the wings of a famous Kabuki actor.
theatres.fullReview: Nagasaki, 1964: Following the death of his Yakuza father, 15-year-old Kikuo is taken under the wings of a famous Kabuki actor. Alongside Shunsuke, the actor’s only son, he decides to dedicate himself to this traditional form of theatre. For decades, the two young men grow and evolve together – and one will become the greatest Japanese master of the art of Kabuki.
theatres.take: Critics came down positive — a 95% critics' score.

ott.title: King of the Hill
ott.review: Set in Texas, this animated series follows the life of propane salesman Hank Hill, who lives with his overly confident substitute Spanish teacher wife Peggy,…
ott.fullReview: Set in Texas, this animated series follows the life of propane salesman Hank Hill, who lives with his overly confident substitute Spanish teacher wife Peggy, wannabe comedian son Bobby, and naive niece Luanne. Hank has conservative views about God, family, and country, but his values and ethics are often challenged by the situations he, his family, and his beer-drinking neighbors/buddies find themselves in.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the animation and originality.

ott.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
ott.review: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

similar.title: Cinderella III: A Twist in Time

ott.fullReview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain — Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work alongside Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis, and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.
ott.take: Reviewers singled out the performances for praise.

ott.title: Lucky
ott.review: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…
ott.fullReview: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

ott.title: Agent Kim Reactivated
ott.review: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.
ott.fullReview: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the action and emotional weight.

ott.title: Cape Fear
ott.review: When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.
ott.fullReview: When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.
ott.take: Reviewers found plenty to like here.
ott.hook: Based on John D's novel ‘The Executioners’.

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Reviewers found plenty to like here.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

similar.title: The Man in the High Castle

ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!

ott.title: X-Men '97
ott.review: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…
ott.fullReview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and action.

ott.title: The Eternal Fragrance
ott.review: When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals,…

similar.title: Till The End of The Moon

ott.fullReview: When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals, demons, and monsters. A century later, Lei Xiuyuan seeks out Qingqiu orphan Xiaobangchui to save his brother. Fate brings them to Chufeng Academy, where loyal friends give her warmth and love begins to bloom. As their bond deepens from friendship to something more, the truth of her origins slowly unravels, threatening everything they've built.

comingSoon.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
comingSoon.review: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction.

similar.title: Ramayana : The Legend of Prince Rama
The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness
The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim

comingSoon.fullReview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: Kung Fu Soccer
comingSoon.review: The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented…
comingSoon.fullReview: The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown! But the Kung Fu Women's Soccer Team has been dealt a hellish script right from the start?! Their opponents are all highly skilled, and external pressure is mounting. The schemes on the field are one after another... Can they use their kung fu to turn the tide on the green field?

comingSoon.title: DELIVERY BOY
comingSoon.review: A young food delivery rider, who dreams of becoming a police officer, is forced to steal money to save his critically…
comingSoon.fullReview: A young food delivery rider, who dreams of becoming a police officer, is forced to steal money to save his critically injured mother. Months later, when he discovers that the same man has been falsely accused of murder, he risks everything to save the life he once unknowingly changed forever.

comingSoon.title: The End of Oak Street
comingSoon.review: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown,…

similar.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock

comingSoon.fullReview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

comingSoon.title: The Rope Curse 4: Kuntilanak
comingSoon.review: A forbidden exorcism is livestreamed in Indonesia, awakening the legendary female spirit Kuntilanak.
comingSoon.fullReview: A forbidden exorcism is livestreamed in Indonesia, awakening the legendary female spirit Kuntilanak. What begins as an online spectacle quickly turns deadly. In Taiwan, Mila watches the ritual—and becomes the curse’s first victim. Soon, mysterious deaths and violent possessions follow. When Yulan collapses and is found to have lost part of her soul, it becomes clear that this is not an isolated incident, but a transnational curse. Seeking answers, Mila’s son returns her ashes to Indonesia, hoping to uncover the truth behind her death.

comingSoon.title: Digger
comingSoon.review: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's savior before the disaster…
comingSoon.fullReview: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's savior before the disaster he's unleashed destroys everything.

comingSoon.title: Other Mommy
comingSoon.review: A young girl, her family and their home are haunted by a sinister entity that is determined to take up residence inside…
comingSoon.fullReview: A young girl, her family and their home are haunted by a sinister entity that is determined to take up residence inside her. But first, it needs to persuade her to let it in…
